title: Gimhae, GSN — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Gimhae, GSN: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Gimhae is a city in GSN with a population of 550,000. A historic city near Busan, known as the cradle of the Gaya Confederacy and home to Gimhae International Airport.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
